hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams connect destination of funds transaction data with audit-ready evidence and structured workflows for clear risk review and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Destination of funds evidence remains fragmented
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to gather and preserve clear evidence linking transactions to final recipients, complicating destination-of-funds reviews. This gap slows investigative workflows and weakens audit readiness for transaction monitoring and regulatory reporting.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates transaction data, wallet activity, provider risk signals and case notes to create an auditable evidence trail that streamlines destination of funds reviews and supports regulatory reporting.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to destination evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals, links them to cases and preserves destination-of-funds evidence for structured compliance review and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns scattered KYT outputs into structured destination-of-funds cases with connected evidence, enabling clearer compliance decisions and stronger audit readiness for VASP workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing destination-of-funds checks with preserved evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and enterprise-grade deployment controls.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for destination of funds evidence?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures destination of funds checks into audit-ready cases linking wallet risk, transactions and counterparties for clear compliance workflows and evidence management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle destination of funds workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes destination of funds alerts into structured reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence packaging within connected transaction monitoring workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve destination of funds evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all review history, decision logs and supporting provider data to support a traceable, reviewable record of destination of funds compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect our KYT and wallet providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates multiple KYT, wallet screening and analytics providers to aggregate destination risk signals in one operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT and compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYT, KYC and other providers, connecting outputs into structured compliance cases without replacing existing tools or providers.
final_title: Preserve destination of funds evidence with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects destination data, wallet risk and transaction alerts into structured, audit-ready compliance workflows.
